description_for_human: Drop-in backend services for SaaS apps — feedback, waitlist, testimonials, changelog, analytics, forms, roadmap, AI gateway, chatbot, and directory.
description_for_model: SaaS Maker provides drop-in backend services for SaaS applications. It offers feedback collection, waitlists, testimonials, changelogs, analytics, forms, roadmaps, AI gateway, chatbot, and a product directory. Developers integrate via REST API or the @saas-maker/sdk npm package. Base API URL: https://api.sassmaker.com. Documentation: https://docs.sassmaker.com. LLM-optimized docs: https://docs.sassmaker.com/llms.txt
